student-rest-api.overview:
Full CRUD REST API for student management with MySQL and validation.

Features to build:
• Student CRUD
• Search
• Validation

Requirements:
• Spring Boot REST API
• Spring Data JPA
• MySQL database
• Postman collection for testing

Bonus:
• Pagination for student list
student-rest-api.explanation: Student Management REST API is a advanced-level project (Week 8). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Student CRUD, Search, Validation.
student-rest-api.githubLabel: Spring Boot REST API — Amigoscode Full Stack
student-rest-api.youtubeLabel: Spring Boot REST API — Full Course 2025 (Amigoscode)
student-rest-api.studyNote:
1. Watch the YouTube tutorial first.
2. Open the GitHub repo — clone or browse the source.
3. Build your version feature-by-feature in IntelliJ.
4. Test each feature before moving on.
5. Mark complete when your project works end-to-end.

employee-rest-api.overview:
Employee CRUD with department filtering and salary search.

Features to build:
• CRUD
• Department Filter
• Salary Search

Requirements:
• Layered architecture (Controller → Service → Repository)
• Spring Data JPA
• MySQL

Bonus:
• Salary statistics endpoint
employee-rest-api.explanation: Employee Management REST API is a advanced-level project (Week 8). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: CRUD, Department Filter, Salary Search.

library-rest-api.overview:
Library API for books, borrowing, returns, and search.

Features to build:
• Add Books
• Borrow Books
• Return Books
• Search

Requirements:
• REST API with proper HTTP methods
• JPA entities with relationships
• MySQL

Bonus:
• Overdue book tracking
library-rest-api.explanation: Library Management API is a advanced-level project (Week 8). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Add Books, Borrow Books, Return Books, Search.

hospital-rest-api.overview:
Hospital API for patients, doctors, and appointments.

Features to build:
• Patient CRUD
• Doctor CRUD
• Appointment CRUD

Requirements:
• Multiple related entities with JPA
• RESTful endpoints
• MySQL

Bonus:
• Appointment conflict detection
